Header.servicesDropdownDescription: Start with a recommended strategy path, then browse the key service options.

Hero.subtitle: Union National Tax helps business owners reduce taxes legally, optimize entity structure, and gain clearer financial control — year-round, not just at filing time.

Footer.brandBio: Specialized tax strategies for construction, real estate, and service-based businesses. Keep more of what you earn with proactive planning.
Footer.newsletterUnavailable: Newsletter signup is not available yet. Email us directly and we will keep you informed.
Footer.disclaimerBody: The information on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute tax, legal, accounting, or financial advice. Use of this site does not create a professional relationship. Please consult a qualified professional for advice specific to your situation.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 Union National Tax. All rights reserved.

metadata.title: Services | Union National Tax
metadata.description: Comprehensive tax strategy, bookkeeping, and CFO services for modern businesses.

Hero.title: Advisory-led tax and financial services for growth-minded business owners.
Hero.subtitle: We lead with strategy. Filing and bookkeeping support it.

PricingSection.title: Choose Your Level of Support
PricingSection.subtitle: Move beyond simple compliance. Select an advisory tier that matches the complexity of your business and your wealth goals.
PricingSection.comparisonSubtitle: Compare plans to find the right level of support for your business needs.

ExecutiveIncentive.title: The Executive Retreat Incentive
ExecutiveIncentive.description: Move beyond simple tax savings. High-revenue partners unlock exclusive access to our annual luxury networking retreats and private wealth summits.

VideoHero.sectionAriaLabel: Tax Strategy Video and Savings Calculator
VideoHero.titlePart1: Stop overpaying the IRS. <gold>Build a smarter business.</gold>
VideoHero.subtitle: Proactive tax strategy and fractional CFO leadership for owners who want more than just a tax preparer.

TrustBar.eyebrow: Trusted by businesses featured in respected industry outlets

HealthCheckSection.title: Get a clear read on your tax position.
HealthCheckSection.subtitle: Take the Proactive CFO Assessment to see where cash leaks, entity issues, and planning gaps may be costing you money.

ThreeCorePaths.title: Choose your primary objective.
ThreeCorePaths.subtitle: Select a path that matches your current business stage and financial goals.

path1.title: Reduce My Tax Bill
path1.description: Institutional-grade tax strategy, S-Corp optimization, and long-term planning for high earners.

path2.title: Gain Financial Control
path2.description: Fractional CFO leadership and strategic bookkeeping to turn your numbers into actionable insight.

path3.title: Specialized Guidance
path3.description: Deep expertise tailored to your industry’s specific regulatory and operational challenges.

ProblemSection.badge: Reactive tax help creates expensive blind spots
ProblemSection.title: Most owners are making
ProblemSection.subtitle: When your tax strategy only shows up at filing time, you lose visibility, flexibility, and cash you could have kept working in the business.

flyingBlind.title: You are flying blind on real cash flow
flyingBlind.description: Important entity and compensation decisions get made without a reliable forward-looking tax picture.

taxSurprises.title: Quarterly surprises keep disrupting momentum
taxSurprises.description: Tax bills show up late, forcing rushed decisions instead of steady planning.

complianceDrag.title: Compliance work crowds out strategy
complianceDrag.description: You pay for filing mechanics while higher-value planning opportunities get missed.

ServicesSection.title: Comprehensive Financial Solutions.
ServicesSection.subtitle: Design a financial operating system that works for your business. From basic compliance to strategic growth tools.

construction.title: Construction
construction.description: Entity, payroll, and cash-flow strategy for operators with moving parts.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.description: Tax planning support for tight-margin hospitality businesses that need better visibility.

NationwideServiceSection.title: Serving Clients Nationwide Virtually.
NationwideServiceSection.subtitle: No location barriers. We provide expert tax strategy to business owners in all 50 states through our secure digital platform.

video.title: Video Consultations
video.description: Face-to-face strategy calls from the comfort of your office.

portal.title: Digital Portal
portal.description: Securely upload documents and sign returns instantly.

multistate.title: Multi-State Expertise
multistate.description: Navigating complex nexus and filing requirements across state lines.

advisor.title: Consistent Advisor
advisor.description: Work with the same dedicated expert, regardless of where you move.

visual.title: Built for owners
visual.description: Secure collaboration, advisory continuity, and strategic tax support without geography slowing things down.

taxSavingsCard.title: Generating wealth through strategic tax reduction.

leadExpertCard.quote: We look for every legal opportunity to build your wealth.

eaCard.title: What is an

industryFocusCard.title: Specialized in
industryFocusCard.description: We understand the nuances of modern digital businesses, consultancies, and specialized professional services.

ExitIntentModal.title: Before you go, check your tax blind spots.

benefits.personalized: Recommendations tailored to your current setup

DifferentiationSection.eyebrow: Filing isn't a Strategy. Planning is.
DifferentiationSection.title: Why Most Business Owners Overpay
DifferentiationSection.subtitle: Most business owners only hear from their tax person when a deadline hits. We work differently — proactively, strategically, and year-round.

scriptedCalls.title: Year-End Scrambling
scriptedCalls.description: Reactive filing when it's too late to save.

rotatingStaff.title: Generalist Support
rotatingStaff.description: Treating your complex business like a basic return.

callCenter.title: Administrative Focus

personalized.title: Proactive Strategy
personalized.description: Monthly planning to identify savings before you pay.

sameAdvisor.title: Industry Specialists
sameAdvisor.description: Deep expertise in construction, restaurants, and growth stages.

boutique.title: Boutique Firm Approach

expertise.title: S-Corp Optimization
expertise.description: Maximize your qualified business income deduction.

DifferentiationSection.ctaText: Ready to experience the difference? Schedule a tax strategy call with our team.

CTASection.fallbackSubtitle: Book a 30-minute tax strategy call. We'll review your situation, identify where you may be overpaying, and explain what strategic support could look like for your business.

metadata.title: About | Union National Tax
metadata.description: Meet the architects of modern wealth. Our mission is to bridge the gap between complex IRS regulations and the agile needs of modern businesses.

hero.fallbackSubtitle: Union National Tax bridges the gap between complex IRS regulations and the agile needs of modern consultants, creators, and agencies.

ValuesBento.title: The cultural pillars behind every engagement.
ValuesBento.integrityTitle: We protect the relationship with the IRS before anything else.
ValuesBento.integrityDescription: Integrity is the anchor. Every recommendation is vetted with documentation and long-term exposure in mind.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: We run planning models until the numbers feel inevitable.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: Every plan is built collaboratively with your leadership team.

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: We deliver decisions quickly without cutting corners on compliance.

TrustVault.title: Bank-grade security with regulatory clarity.
TrustVault.description: We operate like a compliance desk, not a boutique agency. Every plan is designed for longevity, auditability, and total confidence.

irs.title: IRS Compliant
irs.description: Strategies are mapped to verified IRS code and backed with documentation you can audit at any time.

encryption.title: 256-bit Encryption
encryption.description: Sensitive financial data is protected with the same encryption standards used by institutional banks.

strategists.title: Vetted Strategists
strategists.description: Every advisor is screened, certified, and continuously trained on the latest regulatory updates.

FounderSection.name: Jason Astwood, EA, FSCP
FounderSection.quote1: The tax code wasn't written to punish you. It was written to incentivize you.
FounderSection.bio: Jason combines two decades of experience with a strategy-first mindset to help founders keep more of what they earn. He treats every client's business with the same rigor as an institutional portfolio.
FounderSection.quote2: Planning isn't a once-a-year event. It's a partnership that compounds over time.

metadata.title: Contact | Union National Tax
metadata.description: Get in touch with our team of tax experts. Schedule a consultation or speak directly with a strategist.

TeamMemberCard.fallbackQuote: I personally review every inquiry to ensure you're matched with the right strategist for your specific situation.

step2.subtitle: We'll use this to prepare for our conversation.

metadata.title: Team | Union National Tax
metadata.description: Meet our team of CPAs, Enrolled Agents, and financial strategists dedicated to preserving wealth for the modern economy.

fallbacks.heroSubtitle: We are a team of CPAs, Enrolled Agents, and financial strategists united by a single mission: preserving wealth for the modern economy.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: We don't deal in estimates or guesswork. Every strategy is calculated to the penny and backed by tax code.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We operate with total transparency. Our strategies are aggressive but always compliant, designed to withstand scrutiny.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We aren't just your accountants; we are your financial co-pilots, proactive year-round rather than reactive at tax time.

fallbacks.hiringDescription: We don't hire typical accountants. We hire problem solvers who love the puzzle of the tax code. If you believe in precision over speed and strategy over data entry, you belong here.

format.title: Format
format.video: Watch and learn at your pace.
